text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I was so close... so close.
choice_data_list: We'll win for sure next time!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I was so close... so close.
choice_data_list: We'll win for sure next time!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I know you're trying to comfort me, but I don't
need that.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I don't need to run well, I need to win.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'll do it. I'll be faster than anyone
else...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I just need to find out what I'm missing.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Then I'll get results worth being proud of...
